subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Production Docker image rollout denied. Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires 48-hour minimum staging validation which has not been completed, (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup which have not been obtained, (3) POL-603 requires rollback capability and traffic monitoring strategy which are not described in the proposal.
applied_constraints: Staging validation must be completed and documented for minimum 48 hours before resubmission
Change board approval must be obtained prior to production deployment
Post-deployment monitoring and alerting must be configured and verified
Automated rollback procedure must be tested and ready
Traffic monitoring strategy must be defined and validated
